message:
fix: prevent cluster info cards from overflowing on hover (#8569)

Add overflow-hidden with compensating padding/negative-margin to the
cluster grid container. The hover:scale-[1.02] animation on edge cards
caused them to extend beyond the container boundary. The px-2/-mx-2
padding gives cards room to scale while overflow-hidden clips any
remaining overflow.

Fixes #8559

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
